hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodation: Family House Manolov in Obzor offers family rooms with private bathrooms, air-conditioning, and parquet floors. Each room includes a balcony or terrace with city or garden views, a dining table, and a TV.
Leisure Facilities: Guests can relax in the garden or terrace, enjoy free WiFi throughout the property. Additional amenities include a shared kitchen, outdoor seating area, and a sofa bed.
Convenient Location: Located 62 km from Burgas Airport, the hotel is an 8-minute walk from Obzor Central Beach. Nearby attractions include Action AquaPark (33 km) and Old Nesebar (40 km).
Couples particularly like the location â€” they rated it 9.3 for a two-person trip.

hotels.description_en:
Boasting a private beach area with free sun loungers and parasols in Obzor, HVD Reina del Mar - Premium Spa Service & Free Parking features 3 swimming pools for adults, one of which is heated, and one heated pool for younger guests. Free WiFi is provided.
All rooms and suites at HVD Reina del Mar - Premium Spa Service & Free Parking are equipped with a free safe, daily refilled free minibar, coffee machine, special pillow menu and 43" TV. Each offers a bathroom stocked with a shower and branded toiletries. Each opens to a furnished balcony or terrace. Free WiFi is available.
Breakfast is served buffet style, while breakfast for later risers is also provided.

Vivi un'esperienza esclusiva con il servizio di prima classe presso HVD Reina del Mar - Premium Spa Service & Free Parking
Dotato di 3 piscine all'aperto, di cui una riscaldata e una riservata ai bambini, l'HVD Reina del Mar - Ultra All Inclusive sorge a Obzor e offre una spiaggia privata e la connessione WiFi gratuita.
Tutte le camere e le suite dell'HVD Reina del Mar - Ultra All presentano una cassaforte, un minibar, una macchina da caffÃ¨, uno speciale menÃ¹ di cuscini, una TV 43 pollici un bagno con doccia e set di cortesia firmato e un balcone o una terrazza arredati. Usufruirete inoltre della connessione WiFi gratuita.
Al mattino potrete gustare una colazione a buffet e approfittare di una colazione tardiva.
